name: order
description: An ordering value for this record within a sequence. Used when relations alone do not determine position.

aiGuidance.purpose: An ordering value for this record within a sequence. Used when relations alone do not determine position.
aiGuidance.extraction: Use numeric strings ('01', '02', ...) or integers. Within a sequence, values should be consistent in type and sortable. Prefer ordering via section-sequence relations over this field when possible.
